recalls.Description: Approximately 866,000 AirJet and HydroJet Spa Pumps have been recalled due to a significant fire hazard. These spa pumps may have been sold individually or bundled with inflatable spa liners in various colors and styles. The affected spa liners are branded as SaluSpa, Coleman, and Hydro-Force, identifiable by labels on the sides of the liners. This recall specifically targets model numbers P05332, P05339, P05711, P05807, P07000, P07001, P05511, P07034, and P07572, which feature 'Bestway' and the model number on their labels.
recalls.Title: Recall of 866,000 AirJet and HydroJet Spa Pumps Due to Fire Risk; One Fatal Incident Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled spa pumps immediately and contact Bestway at 888-943-2396 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Additional details can be found online at www.bestwayusa.com/product-safety-and-recall or by visiting www.bestwayusa.com and selecting 'Recall and Safety' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled AirJet Spa Pump model number located on label on side of unit
Recalled HydroJet Spa Pump model number located on label on back of unit
Recalled Spa Pump attached to inflatable spa liner

Injuries.Name: CPSC is aware of at least three fires reportedly involving the spa pumps, including one house fire that occurred in January 2024 in Kansas City, Missouri, which resulted in a fatality, and one additional fire that resulted in significant property damage. No additional injuries have been reported. There are seven additional incidents reportedly involving the spa pumps, which are currently under investigation. At this time no injuries have been reported with these additional incidents.

Manufacturers.Name: Bestway (Hong Kong) International Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available at Bestway USA, Amazon, Costco, Walmart, Sam's Club, QVC, RuralKing, Spreetail, and other retailers nationwide from May 2021 to May 2024, priced between $400 and $790.

Remedies.Name: Free replacement spa pump or a refund of $100 for AirJet pumps, $189 for HydroJet pumps

recalls.metaDescription: Bestway recalls 866,000 AirJet and HydroJet Spa Pumps due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a refund or replacement.
